# Chase Creative Co. - Full Documentation

> Jacqueline Chase | Copywriter & Brand Strategist

This file provides a detailed overview of the Chase Creative Co. website for Large Language Models.

## About
Jacqueline Chase is a versatile copywriter specializing in brand messaging, SEO content, and high-conversion copy. The "Chase Creative" brand is built on the philosophy of "Copywriter. Optimist. Brand Builder."

## Services & Expertise

### 1. Brand Messaging & Identity
- Voice and tone development
- Brand storytelling
- Tagline and naming
- Core messaging pillars

### 2. Editorial & Content Marketing
- Thought leadership articles
- SEO-optimized blog posts
- Long-form features
- Newsletter content

### 3. Digital Copywriting
- Website copy
- Landing pages (high-conversion)
- Ad copy
- Product descriptions

## Site Structure (Technical)

### Architecture
- **Framework**: Next.js 15+ (App Router)
- **CMS**: Sanity (v3) - Headless content management.
- **Animations**: Framer Motion (respects prefers-reduced-motion).
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS & Vanilla CSS Design System.
- **Infrastructure**: Vercel.

### Dynamic Routes
- `/work/[slug]`: Case studies with detailed project overviews and results.
- `/blog/[slug]`: Individual articles with portable text content.

## Contact & Engagement
Inquiries can be made via the integrated contact form at `/contact` or via email at hello@chasecreative.co
